[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / floor

# Method: floor()

```ts
floor(value): number;
```

Round down to the closest integer.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value to round down. |

## Returns

`number`

Largest integer less than or equal to the value.
